mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_POST VALUES (#{id}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0, #{memberId})
mapper.select: SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_CREATED_AT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID ORDER BY TBP.ID DESC

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_CREATED_AT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.MEMBER_NAME, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID WHERE TBP.ID = #{id}
